item.description:
# InsomniMac 1.0
The first public release of InsomniMac, a small menu bar utility that keeps a Mac reachable while remote-control agents are working.
## Highlights
- Toggle Awake Lock from the menu bar or with `Command-Shift-Backslash`. - Keep the Mac available for remote-control agents while you are away. - Optionally show the animated awake overlay while the lock is active. - Launch automatically at login and optionally prevent sleep with the lid closed. - Share Remote Mode context with supported agents. - Automatically check for, securely verify, and install future updates.
InsomniMac is free, open source, and MIT licensed.
